antiScamSubtitle: Before you pay, please confirm the following:
antiScamPoint1: You are not being asked, instructed, pressured, or threatened by anyone to make this purchase.
antiScamPoint2: You are not buying this product for investment, cashback, online tasks, jobs, prizes, refunds, account unlocking, account verification, dating, romance, or a streamer's request.
antiScamPoint3: You understand that our platform only provides digital top-up services and does not participate in any third-party transaction, investment, cashback, dating, payment collection, or money transfer activity.
antiScamPoint4: If someone asked you to buy this top-up product, or promised that you could receive money, rewards, refunds, account unlocking, or withdrawals after the purchase, please stop immediately and contact our support team.
antiScamPoint5: Once a digital top-up product is successfully delivered, it may not be reversible.
antiScamCheckOwnNeed: I confirm that this purchase is for my own genuine need and that I am not being induced, instructed, or pressured by anyone to top up for someone else.
antiScamCheckReadWarning: I confirm that I have read and understood the anti-scam warning above and choose to continue the payment by myself.
antiScamRequiredError: Please confirm the anti-scam warning and accept the terms before continuing.
